The '''Imperial Repulsortank 1-L''' was a light variant of the [[Imperial-class repulsortank|''Imperial''-class repulsortank]].

==Description==
Constructed by [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian Industries]], the 1-L was a cheap version of the [[Imperial-class repulsortank|''Imperial''-class repulsortank]]. It mounted only a single [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] [[Mark 3/S Medium Blaster Cannon]]. The 1-L required a crew of two to operate; a driver and a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]]. There was room for two passengers in the tank, usually reserved for a section [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] or [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] [[Sergeant major/Legends|sergeant major]] who generally moved between all the tanks in a unit on a daily basis, although in some cases they can even carry up to four passengers. Like all ''Imperial''-class repulsortanks, the 1-L was built on the same 20.5 [[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long chassis and could reach speeds of up to 300 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]]. It had a cargo capacity of 300 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] and a ground clearance of between two and three meters. 1-Ls cost between 40,000 and 50,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

The lightly-armored hull was sloped in order to deflect blaster fire, and was fully environmentally sealed, with up to 3 [[Standard day/Legends|standard days]] of air and water available. In addition, their Mark 3/S Medium Blaster Cannon has such excellent range and punch that a squad of 1-Ls can easily destroy enemy AFVs.<ref name="Target" />
